p1: Let me show you how I build things.
p2: Thanks for checking out my work.
p4: I am a web developer with a strong passion for building modern digital products, having development skills that I have self-learned from an early stage. I focus on writing clean, scalable code while creating intuitive and visually engaging user interfaces.
p5: Currently a student at HUTECH University, I have hands-on experience with technologies through academic and personal projects. My goal is to grow as a Frontend Developer and contribute to high-quality products in professional and international environments.
pjp3: I’ve worked on a variety of projects, from simple websites to full-scale software applications.
p6: I'm always open to new projects or just a chat. Feel free to reach out!
